rationale.R1.1: The agent reframed the conceptual story, demoting sweeping claims and reordering contributions to match what the design can support.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims, including the interpretation of the causal estimate and the generalizability of CrowdAudit.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no scope drift or omission.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provided some annotations and explanations for changes, not every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason.
